name: Billing Buddies
description: Trusted medical billing company specializing in chiropractic billing and medical billing consulting services in Minnesota.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I have nothing but praise for their work.
They were always responsive to any of our questions and concerns.
I highly recommend Billing Buddies for medical billing service.
Amazing to work with to get all the loose ends tied up.

sentiment.summary: Billing Buddies maintains exceptional client loyalty and satisfaction through responsive, reliable service, with a 20-year client relationship demonstrating trustworthiness and professional excellence.

name: ClaimCare
description: Experienced medical billing services with deep expertise in Minnesota since 1992, offering technology, EMR, reporting, and service.

name: MN Medical Billing
description: Minnesota company providing professional medical billing, bookkeeping, and consulting services tailored to care providers.

name: Medheave
description: Provides end-to-end revenue cycle management, claim submission, tracking, CPT and ICD-10 coding compliance, and customized billing plans throughout Minnesota.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: The art of medicine billing is all about being so good that billers are invisible

sentiment.summary: Medheave delivers seamless, high-quality medical billing services where the process works so well it operates invisibly to clients.

name: Precision Practice Management
description: Offers comprehensive revenue cycle management, medical coding, credentialing, and technical support to practices across Minnesota including Minneapolis, St. Paul, and Rochester.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: able to collect AR claims that would normally be written-off
They stepped up and took control of the transition
generated normal collections in a short time

sentiment.summary: Precision Practice Management excels at proactive AR recovery, managing transitions competently, and delivering measurable results quickly.

name: Transcure
description: Leading medical billing company offering automated RCM, specialty-focused billing, credentialing, charge entry, claim submission, supporting over 40 specialties and major EMR systems.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Truly, the easiest transition I could ever imagine. And their services are fantastic!
Communication is always clear and timely. Their team is knowledgeable, responsive, and efficient.
We are incredibly impressed with Transcure Medical Billing Services' medical billing expertise.
A little room for improvement in reporting details

sentiment.summary: Transcure Medical Billing receives overwhelmingly positive reviews for seamless onboarding, expert team knowledge, reliable communication, and operational efficiency gains, with only one minor suggestion to enhance reporting details.
